structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-29 Launch of Golden State Finance Authority DPA
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-29 10:14:24-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY 

For borrowers living in California, the Golden State Finance Authority down payment assistance programs may be the perfect avenue to help them become homeowners. With both Government and Conventional offerings from two different master servicers, California borrowers have a variety of options. Please read below for additional details. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Euho8kn7XVpIv0xXC-lWyRkBTiePYMarb1m4cUm7zqyrJQ?e=NEApkP> 

 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EszeCZVCIpdKruML1gnBskcBF_D62cCTcYmSlMl8RryfnA?e=Qur4KG>      

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Available to first time and repeat buyers
*	SFR, condos, townhomes, and manufactured homes permitted
*	Amortizing 15-year second mortgage
*	Homebuyer education may be required (dependent on offering)

Platinum (US Bank)

*	640+ FICO
*	Conventional and Government

	*	Assistance up to 5% of the first mortgage loan amount

Golden Opportunities (The Money Source)

*	620+ FICO
*	Conventional

	*	Assistance up to 3.00% of the first mortgage loan amount, with optional Gift funds, up to 1.50%

*	Government

	*	Assistance up to 3.50% of the first mortgage Loan amount, with optional Gift funds, up to 1.50%.

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	CM Codes

GO

FFBGSFAGO30

VFBGSFAGO30

UFBGSFAGO30

CFBGSFAGO30

SFBGSFAGO15

Platinum

FFBGSFAP30

VFBGSFAP30

UFBGSFAP30

CFBGSFAP30

SFBGSFAP15

 

*	Refer to each program’s guidelines for details, as they have different Master Servicers
*	Training is not mandatory, but highly recommended and can be found here <https://gsfahome.org/lender/training.shtml> . 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **
